title: 4형식과 5형식
instruction: 다음 문장이 4형식인지 5형식인지 밝히고, 문장 성분을 표시한 후 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: My dad made me a kite.

answer.analysis: My dad(S) made(V) me(IO) a kite(DO).

problems.stem: She asked me a difficult question.

answer.analysis: She(S) asked(V) me(IO) a difficult question(DO).

problems.stem: We elected him our class president.

answer.analysis: We(S) elected(V) him(O) our class president(OC).
answer.translation: 우리는 그를 우리 반 회장으로 뽑았다.

problems.stem: The teacher taught us many things.

answer.analysis: The teacher(S) taught(V) us(IO) many things(DO).
answer.translation: 선생님은 우리에게 많은 것들을 가르쳐 주셨다.

problems.stem: I found this book very useful.

answer.analysis: I(S) found(V) this book(O) very useful(OC).
answer.translation: 나는 이 책이 매우 유용하다는 것을 알게 되었다.

problems.stem: Could you lend me your pen?

answer.analysis: you(S) Could lend(V) me(IO) your pen(DO)?

problems.stem: People call New York 'The Big Apple'.

answer.analysis: People(S) call(V) New York(O) 'The Big Apple'(OC).

problems.stem: He cooked his family a wonderful dinner.

answer.analysis: He(S) cooked(V) his family(IO) a wonderful dinner(DO).
answer.translation: 그는 가족에게 멋진 저녁을 요리해 주었다.

problems.stem: You should keep your password secret.

answer.analysis: You(S) should keep(V) your password(O) secret(OC).
